"D:\JetBrains\CLion 2020.1\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\dd_pow.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\dd_pow.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\dd_pow.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\dd_pow.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o dd_pow.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdd_pow.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\dd_pow.dir\linklibs.rsp
